resources.description: Full component manifest produced by the Vite plugin
resources.name: Project Manifest

resources.description: Detected framework, project name, MCP server version
resources.name: Project Configuration

tools.description: Returns the currently selected component, or null if nothing is currently selected.
tools.name: get_current_selection

tools.description: Returns up to the n most-recent selections, newest first. Returns an empty array if no selections have been made.
tools.name: list_recent_selections

tools.description: Returns computed CSS styles for the selection referenced by `selectionId` (the `id` field of a `ComponentHandle` returned by `get_current_selection` or `list_recent_selections`). Returns null if the style information is not currently available.
tools.name: get_computed_styles

tools.description: Returns a serialized DOM subtree rooted at the selection referenced by `selectionId` (the `id` field of a `ComponentHandle` returned by `get_current_selection` or `list_recent_selections`), up to `depth` levels deep. Returns null if the subtree is not currently available.
tools.name: get_dom_subtree
